## Summary

Brief description of the changes made in this PR.

## Linked Issue

Closes #[issue-number]

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI/UX improvement

## Validation

### Frontend
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested locally on `npm run dev`

### Backend/Contracts (if applicable)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets --all-features` passes
- [ ] `cargo build --workspace --target wasm32v1-none --release` passes

## UI Evidence

For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots or a short demo video/GIF.

- [ ] Not applicable (no UI changes)
- [ ] Screenshots attached
- [ ] Demo video/GIF attached

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] Changes work on desktop browsers
- [ ] Changes work on mobile browsers
- [ ] No console errors in browser dev tools
- [ ] Accessibility considerations addressed

## Notes

- Document any new environment variables, contract IDs, or deployment steps
- List any dependencies that were added or updated
- Mention any breaking changes for users or other developers
